block_15: Our party is open to all skeletons and ghosts.

block_21: Start with a simple one. Predictions and fortune-telling in trading will not help. Let’s focus on analytics—as soon as you begin to understand what is happening on the charts, trading will become more predictable and fears will recede.
block_22: To make the first step easier, we have prepared for you a not too scary trading strategy with a moving average. Study carefully what this indicator is, how to set it up and use it. Practice on a demo account and join a spooky tournament. It will be useful and terribly fun, we promise!
